plist.dict:
Label __LABEL__ ProgramArguments
__ALFRED_BIN__/agent-launch __SCRIPT__
__SCHEDULE_BLOCK__ StandardOutPath /tmp/__LOG_STEM__.stdout StandardErrorPath /tmp/__LOG_STEM__.stderr EnvironmentVariables
PATH __PATH__ __JAVA_BLOCK__ HOME __HOME__ ALFRED_HOME __ALFRED_HOME__ ALFREDRC __ALFREDRC__ WORKSPACE_ROOT __WORKSPACE_ROOT__ AGENT_CODENAME __AGENT_SHORT__ LAUNCHD_LABEL __LABEL__ __GH_ORG_BLOCK__ __ROLE_BLOCK__
WorkingDirectory __HOME__ RunAtLoad
